_comment: ThunderBridge config for AStockOS — Tencent Cloud MAAS (Anthropic-compatible gateway, passthrough auth).
_usage: cp config.astockos.json config.json  # then launch with bin/thunderbridge
_prereq: ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN must be set to your Tencent Maas API key (in ~/.claude/settings.json env block).

proxy._listen_port: 0 = OS picks a free port dynamically. Worktree-safe.
proxy._anthropic_upstream: Tencent Cloud MaaS Anthropic-compatible gateway. All traffic forwards here unless a route overrides.
proxy._include_stock_models: false = only advertise models from the 'models' list below, not stock Claude (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku). Set true if you want real Claude in /model too.
proxy._learn_stock_models: false = never auto-discover upstream's real Claude model list. Set true to cache new Claude releases automatically.
proxy._pool: ── Connection pool (reuse upstream HTTPS connections, ~69ms → ~1ms TLS overhead per request) ──
proxy._pool_max_idle: Maximum idle connections kept open per upstream host (default 5). Increase for bursty Workflow workloads.
proxy._pool_max_total: Hard cap on concurrent connections to a single upstream host (default 10). Requests beyond this create ephemeral connections.
proxy._pool_idle_timeout: Seconds before an idle connection is closed by the background reaper (default 60).
proxy._circuit: ── Circuit breaker (fast-fail when upstream is down, instead of blocking 600s × 128 threads) ──
proxy._circuit_threshold: Number of consecutive upstream connection failures before the breaker opens (default 5).
proxy._circuit_recovery: Seconds to wait after OPEN before probing with one half-open request (default 30).
proxy._observability: ── Logging & stats (set UC_REQUEST_LOG / UC_STATS_INTERVAL env vars to override) ──
proxy._request_log: true = emit one structured REQ line per proxied request (key=value format). Set false in high-throughput production.
proxy._stats_interval: Seconds between STATS summary lines (uptime, req count, error rate, rps, KB, active conns). 0 disables.

routes._why_three_keys: Claude Code may send different model IDs: (a) claude-deepseek-v4-pro from TB model picker, (b) deepseek-v4-pro from ANTHROPIC_MODEL or /model, (c) deepseek-v4-pro-202606 from ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL settings. All three must route to the same upstream.

_migration: 2026-07-01: switched from DeepSeek official API (api.deepseek.com/anthropic, model=deepseek-v4-pro) back to Tencent Cloud MAAS (tokenhub.tencentmaas.com, model=deepseek-v4-pro-202606). DeepSeek official config preserved as config.deepseek.json.
